violations.description: Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -A bin of soda nozzles were found in hand sink at the time of inspection.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Acoustical tiles above food prep area.
